summary: Tested Coach Virtuel feature - Backend API and Frontend UI. All features working correctly. Backend returns proper progress data with 4 steps. Frontend displays floating coach button, auto-opens panel for users who haven't completed all steps, shows step statuses (Fait/En cours), and only appears for 'particulier' role.
critical_code_review_comments: Coach Virtuel implementation is complete and working correctly
Backend GET /api/coach/progress returns all required fields: steps, completed, current_step, progress_pct, message, emoji
For testboost user: Step 3 (CV) is complete=true, Step 1 (D'CLIC) is complete=false - as expected
Frontend CoachVirtuel.jsx properly uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Coach auto-opens 1.5s after login for users who haven't completed all steps
Coach only renders for role='particulier' (verified by testing partenaire role)
All 4 steps display with correct statuses: 'Fait' for completed, 'En cours' for current step
Action button 'Importer D'CLIC PRO' visible for step 1 (current step)
test_credentials: testboost / Solerys777!, bob23 / Solerys777!, cluximon@gmail.com / Solerys777!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach Virtuel feature fully tested. Backend API /api/coach/progress working correctly. Frontend displays coach bubble (data-testid='coach-bubble-btn'), panel (data-testid='coach-panel'), close button (data-testid='coach-close-btn'), steps (data-testid='coach-step-{1-4}'), and action buttons (data-testid='coach-action-step-{id}'). Coach only appears for 'particulier' role. Note: In preview environment, the 'Made with Emergent' badge may overlap with the coach bubble button, but this is an environment issue, not an app bug.

backend.GET /api/coach/progress?token=TOKEN: PASS - Returns steps, completed, total, current_step, progress_pct, message, emoji
backend.Step structure validation: PASS - Each step has id, title, description, complete, partial, action_label, action_path, action_type, details

frontend.Coach bubble button visible: PASS - data-testid='coach-bubble-btn' visible in bottom-right corner
frontend.Coach panel auto-opens: PASS - Opens 1.5s after login for users who haven't completed all steps
frontend.4 steps displayed: PASS - All 4 steps visible with data-testid='coach-step-{1-4}'
frontend.Step 1 'En cours' badge: PASS - Current step shows 'En cours' badge
frontend.Action button visible: PASS - 'Importer D'CLIC PRO' button visible for step 1
frontend.Close button works: PASS - Panel closes when X button clicked
frontend.Coach only for particulier: PASS - Coach NOT visible for partenaire role
frontend.Progress display: PASS - Shows '1/4 étapes' and progress bar
